text:
An Olympic athlete has suffered burns to 75 per cent of her body after she was doused in petrol and set on fire, allegedly by her boyfriend.

Rebecca Cheptegei, a Ugandan long-distance runner is in the Intensive Care Unit after she was attacked in her home in Trans Nzoia County in Kenya and set on fire.

Trans Nzoia County Police Commander Jeremiah ole Kosiom on Monday said Cheptegei’s boyfriend, Dickson Ndiema Marangach, allegedly procured petrol and poured it on her before setting her alight.

A police report seen by the Associated Press alleged the pair were heard fighting before the fire was set.

Cheptegei is currently recovering in the intensive care unit at the Moi Teaching and Referral Hospital in Eldoret City, having suffered burns to 75 per cent of her body, including her face.

We regret to announce that our athlete Rebecca Cheptegei, who competed at the Olympics has suffered severe injuries and is hospitalized at Moi Teaching and Referral Hospital in Eldoret. This follows an incident involving her Kenyan boyfriend pouring petrol and setting fire on herpic.twitter.com/rgnWvgTpkb

Police allege Cheptegei, who competed in the women's marathon at the 2024 Paris Olympics, was attacked by Marangach after he allegedly snuck into her house about 2pm on Sunday while she was at church with her children.

“The couple was heard quarrelling outside their house. During the altercation, the boyfriend was seen pouring a liquid on the woman before burning her. The suspect was also caught by the fire and sustained serious burns,” Kosiom told local media.

"At the scene, a five-litre yellow jerrican, a bag and a black marvin believed to be for Dickson and a burnt mobile phone believed to be for Rebecca were collected for forensic analysis.”

Kosiom said Marangach also sustained serious burns in the attack.

He said neighbours raced to the rescue and put out the fire and before rushing the pair to hospital.

Cheptegei competed for Uganda at the 2024 Summer Olympics in the women's marathon, finishing in 44th place.

title: Paris Olympic athlete hospitalised after boyfriend allegedly doused her in petrol and set her on fire | Sky News Australia
description: Rebecca Cheptegei, a Ugandan long-distance runner is in the Intensive Care Unit after she was attacked in her home in Trans Nzoia County in Kenya and set on fire.
